alerts.title: Iran nuclear breakout window narrows to 1-2 weeks at 60% enrichment
alerts.summary: Global metrics confirm Iran has reached 60% uranium-235 enrichment with estimated breakout time of approximately 1-2 weeks. Multiple nuclear headlines (UN News, FDD, Jerusalem Post) report US-Iran MoU technical negotiations underway but experts warn deal faces 'blind spot' over enriched uranium stockpile disposition. This represents material nuclear escalation amid active diplomacy.

alerts.title: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz, threatens missile strike on Israel tonight
alerts.summary: Iran reportedly closed the Strait of Hormuz and threatened missile fire on Israel as ceasefire violations continue in Lebanon. Multiple outlets (Ynetnews, PBS, NBC News) report Iran's closure is linked to ongoing Israeli strikes killing at least 20 in Lebanon and ceasefire breakdown. Represents direct Iranian escalation threat tied to regional hostilities.

alerts.title: Israeli strikes kill 20+ in Lebanon, journalist Ahmed Wishah confirmed dead in Gaza
alerts.summary: Multiple sources (Reuters, BBC, Al Jazeera, Guardian) confirm Israeli airstrikes killed at least 20 people in Lebanon within hours of ceasefire announcement. Al Jazeera cameraman Ahmed Wishah killed in Gaza strike alongside 6 others including 2 children. Represents continued escalation despite ceasefire declarations and targeting of press personnel.

alerts.title: US maintains three-carrier posture with USS Florida submarine deep in Persian Gulf
alerts.summary: Assets feed confirms USS Florida submarine deployed to Persian Gulf (26.42°N, 52.41°E) alongside USS Dwight D. Eisenhower in Red Sea, USS Abraham Lincoln in Arabian Sea, and USS Gerald R. Ford in Mediterranean. Represents sustained US subsurface and surface power projection amid Iran threat escalation and diplomatic talks in Switzerland.
alerts.region: Persian Gulf / Arabian Sea / Red Sea

alerts.title: DeepState UA confirms Ukraine strikes critical Russian supply bridge at Chongar
alerts.summary: DeepState UA post (~269K views, June 10) reports Ukrainian forces achieved two precise strikes on Chongar automobile bridge over newly constructed R-280 route linking Rostov-on-Don to Simferopol. Bridge damage limits Russian southern logistics corridor and triggers blockade cascade. Reflects sustained Ukrainian strike capability against Russian rear-area infrastructure.

analysis_note: US-Iran nuclear diplomacy in Switzerland proceeds as Iran closes Strait of Hormuz, enriches to 60% U-235 (1-2 week breakout), and escalates rhetoric amid simultaneous Israeli-Hezbollah-Gaza fighting; threat level at critical (9/10) with multiple proxy forces (Houthis, Hezbollah, PMF) active and US carrier presence reinforced.
